title: Semenovia komarovii

This family is a group of flowering plants that includes many species of wild Brassicas. Semenovia komarovii is a member of the genus Semenovia, which is a small genus of flowering plants native to Central Asia. The genus Semenovia is closely related to the genus Arabis, which is also part of the Brassicaceae family. Semenovia komarovii is further classified as a species within the kingdom Plantae.
